name: Absorb
description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user recovers 20% of the HP it inflicts on the target.

name: Acid
description: The opposing Pokémon are sprayed with a harsh, acidic liquid. Always lowers their Defense stat.

name: Acid Armor
description: The user alters its cellular structure to liquefy itself, sharply raising its Defense stat by two stages.

name: Aerial Ace
description: The user confounds the target with speed, then slashes. This attack never misses.

name: Aeroblast
description: A vortex of air is shot at the target to inflict damage. May lower the target's Attack stat. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Agility
description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. Sharply raises the Speed stat by two stages.

name: Amnesia
description: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. Sharply raises the Sp. Def stat by two stages.

name: Ancient Power
description: The user attacks with a prehistoric power. May raise all of the user's stats at once.

name: Aqua Jet
description: The user lunges at the target at a speed that makes it almost invisible. Always goes first.

name: Attract
description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the target becomes infatuated and less likely to attack.

name: Aurora Beam
description: The target is hit with a rainbow-colored beam. Always lowers the target's Attack stat.

name: Barrage
description: A round object is hurled at the target with great force. May confuse the target.

name: Barrier
description: The user throws up a sturdy wall that sharply raises its Defense stat by two stages.

name: Baton Pass
description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting, passing along any stat changes.

name: Beat Up
description: The user gets all party Pokémon to attack the target. The more party members, the more hits.

name: Belly Drum
description: The user maximizes its Attack stat in exchange for HP equal to half its maximum HP.

name: Bide
description: The user endures attacks for two turns, then strikes back to inflict double the damage it took.

name: Bind
description: Things such as long bodies or vines are used to bind and squeeze the target for 2 to 5 turns.

name: Bite
description: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. May cause flinching.

name: Blizzard
description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. May freeze them. Never misses in a hailstorm.

name: Body Slam
description: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. May paralyze the target.

name: Bone Club
description: The user clubs the target with a bone. May cause flinching.

name: Bone Rush
description: The user strikes the target with a hard bone 2 to 5 times in a row.

name: Bonemerang
description: The user throws the bone it holds. The bone loops to hit the target twice — once on the way out and once on the way back.

name: Brave Bird
description: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. The user also takes recoil damage.

name: Bubble
description: A spray of countless bubbles is jetted at the opposing Pokémon. May lower their Speed stat.

name: Bubble Beam
description: A spray of bubbles is forcefully ejected at the target. May lower its Speed stat.

name: Bulldoze
description: The user stomps down on the ground and attacks everything in the area. Always lowers targets' Speed stat.

name: Bullet Punch
description: The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. Always goes first.

name: Charm
description: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. Harshly lowers the target's Attack stat by two stages.

name: Clamp
description: The target is clamped and squeezed by the user's very thick and sturdy shell for 2 to 5 turns.

name: Confuse Ray
description: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that triggers confusion.

name: Confusion
description: The target is hit by a weak telekinetic force. May confuse the target.

name: Constrict
description: The target is gripped and squeezed tightly. Always lowers the target's Speed stat.

name: Conversion
description: The user changes its type to match the type of one of its moves.

name: Cotton Spore
description: The user releases cotton-like spores that cling to opposing Pokémon, harshly lowering their Speed stat by two stages.

name: Counter
description: A retaliation move that counters any physical attack with double the damage taken.

name: Cross Chop
description: The user delivers a double chop with its forearms crossed. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Crunch
description: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. May lower the target's Defense stat.

name: Curse
description: The user cuts 25% of its own maximum HP and puts a hex on the target. The target loses HP every turn.

name: Cut
description: The target is cut with a scythe or claw.

name: Defense Curl
description: The user curls up to conceal weak spots and raise its Defense stat. Also boosts the power of Rollout.

name: Destiny Bond
description: When this move is used, if the user faints, the Pokémon that landed the knockout hit also faints.

name: Detect
description: Enables the user to evade all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

name: Dig
description: The user burrows into the ground on the first turn, then attacks on the second. Can dodge attacks while underground.

name: Disable
description: For several turns, this move prevents the target from using the move it used last.

name: Dizzy Punch
description: The target is hit with rhythmically launched punches that always confuse the target if they hit.

name: Double Kick
description: The target is hit twice in a row. Both hits are calculated separately.

name: Double Slap
description: Slaps the target 2 to 5 times in a row. Each hit is calculated separately.

name: Double Team
description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to raise its evasiveness.

name: Dragon Breath
description: The user exhales a mighty gust that inflicts damage. May paralyze the target.

name: Dragon Rage
description: This attack hits the target with a shock wave of pure rage. It always deals exactly 40 HP of damage regardless of the target's stats.

name: Dragon Rush
description: The user tackles the target while exhibiting overwhelming menace. May cause the target to flinch.

name: Drain Punch
description: An energy-draining punch. The user recovers half the HP it inflicts.

name: Draining Kiss
description: The user steals the target's energy with a kiss. The user recovers 75% of the HP it inflicts on the target.

name: Dream Eater
description: The user eats the dreams of a sleeping target. The user gains half the HP it inflicts. Only works on sleeping targets.

name: Dynamic Punch
description: The user punches the target with full, concentrated power. Always confuses the target if it hits.

name: Earth Power
description: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. May lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

name: Earthquake
description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes all Pokémon around it.

name: Egg Bomb
description: A large egg is hurled at the target with tremendous force. May cause flinching.

name: Ember
description: The target is attacked with small flames. May burn the target.

name: Encore
description: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

name: Endure
description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

name: Explosion
description: The user explodes to inflict damage on all Pokémon in battle. The user faints upon using this move.

name: Extreme Speed
description: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This attack always goes first with high priority.

name: Fairy Wind
description: The user stirs up a fairy wind and strikes the target with it.

name: Feint Attack
description: The user approaches the target disarmingly, then throws a sucker punch. This attack never misses.

name: Fire Blast
description: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. May burn the target.

name: Fire Punch
description: A fiery punch. May burn the target.

name: Fire Spin
description: The target becomes trapped within a fierce vortex of fire that rages for 2 to 5 turns.

name: Flail
description: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.

name: Flame Wheel
description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges at the target. May burn the target.

name: Flamethrower
description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. May burn the target.

name: Flash
description: The user flashes a bright light to cut the target's accuracy.

name: Fly
description: The user soars up on the first turn, then strikes on the second. Can dodge attacks while in the air.

name: Focus Energy
description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that critical hits land more easily.

name: Foresight
description: Enables a Ghost-type target to be hit by Normal- and Fighting-type attacks.

name: Fury Attack
description: The target is jabbed repeatedly with a horn or beak 2 to 5 times in a row.

name: Fury Cutter
description: The target is slashed with scythes or claws. Its power increases if it hits in consecutive turns.

name: Fury Swipes
description: The target is raked with sharp claws or scythes quickly 2 to 5 times in a row.

name: Future Sight
description: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

name: Giga Drain
description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user recovers 60% of the HP it inflicts on the target.

name: Glare
description: The user intimidates the target with the pattern on its belly to harshly lower its Attack stat by two stages.

name: Growl
description: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary and lowering their Attack stat.

name: Guillotine
description: A powerful chop that can knock out the target in one hit. If it connects, the target faints instantly.

name: Gust
description: A gust of wind is whipped up. Deals double damage to targets in the air.

name: Hail
description: The user summons a hailstorm lasting five turns. It hurts all Pokémon except Ice types each turn.

name: Harden
description: The user stiffens all the muscles in its body to raise its Defense stat.

name: Haze
description: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all Pokémon engaged in battle.

name: Headbutt
description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging straight into the target. May cause flinching.

name: Heal Bell
description: The user makes a soothing bell chime to heal the status conditions of all the party's Pokémon.

name: Hex
description: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by a status condition.

name: Hidden Power
description: A unique attack that varies in type and power depending on the individual Pokémon using it.

name: High Jump Kick
description: The target is attacked with a knee kick from a jump. If this attack misses, the user is hurt.

name: Horn Attack
description: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed horn to inflict damage.

name: Horn Drill
description: The user stabs the target with a horn that rotates like a drill. If it hits, the target faints instantly.

name: Hurricane
description: This move never misses during rain. If Pidgeot uses it, it never misses, has a 30% chance of confusion, and uses Sp. Attack.

name: Hydro Pump
description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

name: Hyper Beam
description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

name: Hyper Fang
description: The user bites hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. May cause flinching.

name: Hypnosis
description: The user employs hypnotic suggestion to make the target fall into a deep sleep.

name: Ice Beam
description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam. May freeze the target.

name: Ice Punch
description: An icy punch. May freeze the target.

name: Ice Shard
description: The user flash-freezes chunks of ice and hurls them at the target. Always goes first.

name: Icy Wind
description: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. Always lowers the target's Speed stat.

name: Iron Head
description: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. May cause flinching.

name: Iron Tail
description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. May lower the target's Defense stat.

name: Jump Kick
description: The user jumps up high, then strikes with a kick. If this attack misses, the user is hurt.

name: Karate Chop
description: A sharp chop with the hand. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Kinesis
description: The user distracts the target by bending a spoon. Lowers the target's accuracy stat.

name: Leech Life
description: The user drains the target's blood. The user recovers half the HP it inflicts.

name: Leech Seed
description: A seed is planted on the target. It steals some HP from the target every turn.

name: Leer
description: The user gives opposing Pokémon an intimidating leer that lowers their Defense stat.

name: Lick
description: The target is licked with a long tongue, causing damage. May paralyze the target.

name: Light Screen
description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

name: Lock-On
description: The user takes sure aim at the target. The user's next attack is guaranteed to hit.

name: Low Kick
description: A powerful low kick that makes the target stumble. May cause flinching.

name: Mach Punch
description: The user throws a punch at blinding speed. Always goes first.

name: Mean Look
description: The user pins the target with a dark, arresting look. The target becomes unable to flee.

name: Meditate
description: The user meditates to awaken the power deep within its body and raises its Attack stat.

name: Mega Drain
description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user recovers 40% of the HP it inflicts on the target.

name: Megahorn
description: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

name: Metal Claw
description: The target is raked with steel claws. May raise the user's Attack stat.

name: Metronome
description: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

name: Milk Drink
description: The user restores its own HP by up to half its maximum HP.

name: Mimic
description: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move replaces Mimic for the duration of the battle.

name: Mind Reader
description: The user senses the target's movements with its mind to ensure its next attack does not miss.

name: Mirror Coat
description: A retaliation move that counters any special attack with double the damage taken.

name: Mirror Move
description: The user counters the target by mimicking the move last used by the target.

name: Mist
description: The user cloaks its body and allies with a white mist that prevents any of their stats from being lowered for five turns.

name: Morning Sun
description: The user restores its own HP. The amount restored varies with the weather, recovering more under harsh sunlight.

name: Mud-Slap
description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and always lowers its accuracy.

name: Nasty Plot
description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. Sharply raises the user's Sp. Atk by two stages.

name: Night Shade
description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

name: Nightmare
description: A sleeping target sees a nightmare that inflicts 25% of its maximum HP each turn.

name: Octazooka
description: The user launches a thick, sticky glob of ink. Has a 50% chance of lowering the target's accuracy.

name: Outrage
description: The user rampages and attacks for 2 to 3 turns. The user then becomes confused.

name: Pain Split
description: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally shares the combined HP with the target.

name: Pay Day
description: Numerous coins are hurled at the target. Money is scattered on the ground after the battle.

name: Peck
description: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn.

name: Perish Song
description: Any Pokémon that hears this song faints in three turns, unless it switches out of battle.

name: Petal Dance
description: The user attacks with a faceful of petals for 2 to 3 turns, then becomes confused afterward.

name: Pin Missile
description: A sharp spike is shot at the target with great precision.

name: Play Rough
description: The user plays rough with the target and attacks. May lower the target's Attack stat.

name: Poison Gas
description: A cloud of poison gas is sprayed in the face of opposing Pokémon, poisoning them.

name: Poison Powder
description: The user scatters a cloud of poisonous dust that poisons the target.

name: Poison Sting
description: The user stabs the target with a venomous stinger. May poison the target.

name: Pound
description: A regular attack using the body or tail to strike the target.

name: Power-Up Punch
description: Striking opponents over and over makes the user's fists harder. Always raises the user's Attack stat.

name: Present
description: The user attacks by giving the target a gift with a hidden trap. It may also restore the target's HP instead.

name: Protect
description: Enables the user to evade all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

name: Psybeam
description: The target is attacked with a peculiar ray. May leave the target confused.

name: Psych Up
description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

name: Psychic
description: The target is hit by a strong telekinetic force. May lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

name: Psywave
description: The target is attacked with an odd psychic wave. Always lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

name: Quick Attack
description: The user lunges at the target at a speed that makes it almost invisible. Always goes first.

name: Rage
description: As long as this move is in use, the power of rage raises the user's Attack stat each time it's hit.

name: Rain Dance
description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type moves.

name: Rapid Spin
description: A spin attack that can also eliminate such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed.

name: Razor Leaf
description: Sharp-edged leaves are launched to slash at the opposing Pokémon. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Recover
description: Restoring its own cells, the user restores its own HP by half its maximum HP.

name: Reflect
description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

name: Rest
description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. It fully restores its HP and heals any status conditions.

name: Reversal
description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

name: Roar
description: The target is scared off, replaced by another Pokémon in the party. In the wild, the battle ends.

name: Rock Slide
description: Large boulders are hurled at the opposing Pokémon to inflict damage. May cause flinching.

name: Rock Smash
description: The user attacks with a punch. May lower the target's Defense stat.

name: Rock Tomb
description: Boulders are hurled at the target. Always lowers the target's Speed stat.

name: Rollout
description: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. Its power increases each turn. Boosted further if Defense Curl was used first.

name: Sacred Fire
description: The target is razed with a mystical fire of great power. May burn the target.

name: Safeguard
description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

name: Sand Attack
description: Sand is hurled in the target's face, reducing its accuracy.

name: Sandstorm
description: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to hurt all combatants except Rock, Ground, and Steel types each turn.

name: Scary Face
description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat by two stages.

name: Scratch
description: Hard, pointed, sharp claws rake the target to inflict damage.

name: Screech
description: An earsplitting screech harshly lowers the target's Defense stat by two stages.

name: Seismic Toss
description: The target is thrown using the power of gravity. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

name: Self-Destruct
description: The user attacks everything around it by causing an explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

name: Shadow Ball
description: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target. May lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

name: Shadow Claw
description: The user slashes with a sharp claw made from shadows. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Sharpen
description: The user makes its edges more jagged, which raises its Attack stat.

name: Sing
description: A soothing lullaby is sung in a calming voice that puts the target into a deep slumber.

name: Sketch
description: The user permanently copies the last move used by the target. Sketch's PP becomes that of the copied move.

name: Skull Bash
description: The user tucks in its head to raise its Defense stat on the first turn, then rams the target on the second turn.

name: Slash
description: The target is attacked with a slash of claws. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Sleep Powder
description: The user scatters a big cloud of sleep-inducing dust around the target.

name: Sleep Talk
description: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

name: Sludge Bomb
description: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. May poison the target.

name: Smog
description: The target is attacked with a discharge of filthy gases. Always poisons the target if it hits.

name: Smokescreen
description: The user releases an obscuring cloud of smoke or ink to lower the target's accuracy stat.

name: Snore
description: An attack that can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also cause flinching.

name: Soft-Boiled
description: The user restores its own HP by up to half its maximum HP.

name: Solar Beam
description: In the first turn, the user absorbs sunlight. In the second turn, it unleashes the stored energy. Attacks in a single turn under harsh sunlight.

name: Sonic Boom
description: The target is hit with a blast of compressed air that always deals 20 HP of damage regardless of the target's stats or type.

name: Spider Web
description: The user ensnares the target with thin, gooey silk so it can't flee from battle.

name: Spike Cannon
description: Sharp spikes are shot at the target in rapid succession. Hits 2 to 5 times.

name: Spikes
description: The user lays a trap of spikes at the opposing team's feet. They are hurt when switching in.

name: Splash
description: The user just flops and splashes around to no effect at all…

name: Spore
description: The user scatters bursts of spores that induce sleep.

name: Steel Wing
description: The target is hit with wings of steel. May raise the user's Defense stat.

name: Stomp
description: The target is stomped with a big foot. May cause flinching.

name: String Shot
description: Opposing Pokémon are bound with silk blown from the user's mouth that harshly lowers their Speed stat.

name: Struggle
description: An attack that is used in desperation only if the user has no PP. The user also takes recoil damage.

name: Stun Spore
description: The user scatters a cloud of numbing powder that paralyzes the target.

name: Submission
description: The user grabs the target and recklessly dives for the ground.

name: Substitute
description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

name: Super Fang
description: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. It cuts the target's HP in half.

name: Supersonic
description: The user generates odd sound waves from its body that confuse the target.

name: Surf
description: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

name: Swagger
description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, it also sharply raises the target's Attack stat.

name: Sweet Kiss
description: The user kisses the target with a sweet, angelic cuteness that causes confusion.

name: Swift
description: Star-shaped rays are shot at the opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

name: Swords Dance
description: A frenetic dance that sharply raises the user's Attack stat by two stages.

name: Synthesis
description: The user restores its own HP. The amount restored varies with the weather, recovering more under harsh sunlight.

name: Tackle
description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

name: Tail Whip
description: The user wags its tail cutely, making opposing Pokémon less wary and lowering their Defense stat.

name: Take Down
description: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. The user also takes recoil damage.

name: Teleport
description: The user instantly switches out, passing along any stat changes it has to the incoming Pokémon.

name: Thief
description: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

name: Thunder
description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. May paralyze the target. Never misses in rain.

name: Thunder Punch
description: An electrified punch. May paralyze the target.

name: Thunder Wave
description: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

name: Thunderbolt
description: A strong electric blast crashes down on the target. May paralyze the target.

name: Thundershock
description: A jolt of electricity crashes down on the target. May paralyze the target.

name: Toxic
description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

name: Transform
description: The user transforms into a copy of the target, right down to having the same move set.

name: Tri Attack
description: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. May burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

name: Triple Axel
description: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successive hit.

name: Triple Kick
description: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successive hit.

name: Twineedle
description: The user damages the target twice in a row with stingers. May also poison the target.

name: Venoshock
description: The user drenches the target in a special poisonous liquid. Uses the user's Sp. Atk and targets the opponent's Defense. Deals double damage if the target is already poisoned.

name: Vine Whip
description: The target is struck with slender, whiplike vines to inflict damage.

name: Vise Grip
description: The target is gripped and squeezed with great force.

name: Vital Throw
description: The user attacks last. In return, this throw move is guaranteed to hit.

name: Water Gun
description: The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water.

name: Waterfall
description: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

name: Whirlpool
description: Traps the target in a vortex of water that lasts for 2 to 5 turns.

name: Whirlwind
description: The target is blown away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, the battle ends.

name: Wide Breaker
description: The user swings its wide body around to attack. Always lowers the target's Attack stat.

name: Wing Attack
description: The target is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide to inflict damage.

name: Wrap
description: A long body or vines are used to wrap and squeeze the target for 2 to 5 turns.

name: Zap Cannon
description: The user fires an electric blast like a cannon to inflict damage and cause paralysis.
